name: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy, golden pancakes perfect for a weekend breakfast.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
In another bowl, whisk milk, egg, and melted butter.
Combine wet and dry ingredients; stir until just mixed.
Heat a griddle over medium heat; lightly oil.
Pour ¼ cup batter per pancake; cook until bubbles form.
Flip and cook until golden brown.

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple, healthy, and delicious avocado toast.
instructions: Toast the bread until golden and crispy.
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Spread avocado mixture on toast.
Top with red pepper flakes or poached egg if desired.

name: Greek Yogurt Bowl
description: Creamy yogurt bowl with fresh fruits and granola.
instructions: Spoon yogurt into a bowl.
Top with berries, granola, and chia seeds.
Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Classic Caesar salad with homemade dressing.
instructions: Wash and chop romaine lettuce.
Toss with Caesar dressing in a large bowl.
Add croutons and parmesan cheese.
Serve with a lemon wedge.

name: Chicken Wrap
description: Grilled chicken wrap with fresh vegetables.
instructions: Warm tortillas briefly on a pan.
Layer chicken, lettuce, tomatoes, and avocado.
Drizzle with ranch dressing.
Roll tightly and cut in half.

name: Tomato Soup
description: Creamy homemade tomato soup with basil.
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic until soft.
Add tomatoes and cook for 10 minutes.
Pour in broth and simmer 15 minutes.
Blend until smooth, stir in cream.
Garnish with fresh basil.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Classic Italian spaghetti with rich meat sauce.
instructions: Brown ground beef in a large pan.
Add onion and garlic; cook 5 minutes.
Stir in crushed tomatoes; simmer 30 minutes.
Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
Serve sauce over pasta with parmesan.

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Perfectly grilled salmon with lemon and herbs.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
Brush salmon with olive oil; season with salt and pepper.
Place lemon slices on grill, top with salmon.
Grill 4-5 minutes per side.
Garnish with fresh dill.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: Colorful vegetable stir fry with ginger and soy sauce.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok over high heat.
Add garlic and ginger; stir fry 30 seconds.
Add vegetables; cook 3-4 minutes until crisp-tender.
Pour in soy sauce; toss well.
Serve over cooked rice.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Soft and chewy classic chocolate chip cookies.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Cream butter and sugars until fluffy.
Beat in eggs one at a time.
Gradually mix in flour.
Stir in chocolate chips.
Bake 9-11 minutes until golden.

name: Classic Cheesecake
instructions: Mix crumbs and butter; press into pan bottom.
Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
Add eggs one at a time, then sour cream.
Pour over crust; bake 55 minutes.
Cool slowly in oven with door cracked.
Refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving.

name: Fruit Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to blender.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour into glasses and serve immediately.

name: French Omelette
description: Light and fluffy classic French omelette.
instructions: Whisk eggs vigorously with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour in eggs; stir rapidly with fork.
When set, add fillings to center.
Fold into thirds and slide onto plate.

name: Beef Tacos
description: Flavorful Mexican beef tacos with all the fixings.
instructions: Brown ground beef in skillet over medium heat.
Drain excess fat; add taco seasoning and water.
Simmer 5 minutes until thickened.
Warm taco shells according to package.
Fill shells with beef and toppings.

name: Apple Pie
description: Traditional homemade apple pie with flaky crust.
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
Mix apples with sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
Line pan with bottom crust; add apple mixture.
Dot with butter; cover with top crust.
Bake 15 minutes at 425°, then 45 minutes at 350°.
